　　就在今天，师父喊我下山履行婚约……
　　不曾想，下山后却意外和一位美女一夜风情，我做梦都没想到，那美女竟是我未婚妻。
　　“什么？她竟然是传说中的神凰之体，顶级的双修体质？”
　　“什么？师父，你说她是给我的新手大礼包？”
　　“什么？我原来还有一个惊天身份，是上古家族少主？”
　　“你个糟老头子，你到底还有多少瞒着我的？？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ee213b81d4279fe255aae85d795b5f38","author":"缘墨子","author_id":"","book_id":"7124642973161098253","book_name":"绝世狂龙","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9280人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":124,"name":"都市修真","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124&name=都市修真&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":26,"name":"神医","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=26&name=神医&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1455,"name":"风水秘术","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1455&name=风水秘术&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7125962376406368782","read_count":"9280","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2882503"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"1286","tags":"都市修真,都市,神医,多女主,打脸,风水秘术","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/09adc363fdf85161e35c12e0ced27a86~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779251293&x-signature=qLM5zMqNYkR%2BJSZNOQUZJDzy%2B78%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1189"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032112281360ADA9F73ECD4BF79671"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读120小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration
